description: A perfect addition to your daily wardrobe, this sandal from catwalk is crafted from durable material in fashionable cuts to offer exemplary comfort without compromising on style. Upper Synthetic leather straps on the forefoot with diamond pattern cut-outs Heel cup to lock the foot in place A midfoot length strap connecting the forefoot straps and heel cup with an elasticated band to offer a snug Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Textured TPU outsole with waffle pattern lugs on the heel for absolute grip and traction Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
